title: leucanthemum praecox var. alpicola
intro: Leucanthemum praecox var. alpicola, also known as mountain daisy, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to mountainous regions in Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and essential oils. The health benefits of Leucanthemum praecox var. alpicola include its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Leucanthemum praecox var. alpicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
